metadata.description: EvolveHQ plugins for documentation-led, ADR-driven development.

plugins.name: docflow
plugins.description: ADR-driven documentation workflow — scaffold (or retrofit) an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) catalogue, a plan/ queue, and AGENTS.md conventions into any repo, then author, queue, ship, audit, and roll up ADRs with lifecycle skills — across one repo or a multi-repo product.
